ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Acura, Toyota) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the vehicle_classes table */,
  "engine_size_l" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the fuel_types table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle model (e.g., Active, Discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_fuel_efficiency" (
  "vehicle_fuel_efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the vehicles table */,
  "fuel_consumption_city_l_100km" REAL /* Fuel consumption in the city (L/100 km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_hwy_l_100km" REAL /* Fuel consumption on the highway (L/100 km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_comb_l_100km" REAL /* Combined fuel consumption (L/100 km) */,
  "fuel_consumption_comb_mpg" REAL /* Combined fuel consumption in miles per gallon (mpg) */,
  "co2_emissions_g_km" INTEGER /* CO2 emissions in grams per kilometer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_fuel_efficiency_id")
)
